patch_analysis: FileChange(file_path='x-pack/plugin/inference/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/inference/external/openai/OpenAiStreamingProcessor.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['// continue until the end of delta', 'while (currentToken != null && currentToken != XContentParser.Token.END_OBJECT) {', 'if (currentToken == XContentParser.Token.START_OBJECT || currentToken == XContentParser.Token.START_ARRAY) {', 'parser.skipChildren();', '}', '', 'if (currentToken == XContentParser.Token.FIELD_NAME && parser.currentName().equals(CONTENT_FIELD)) {', 'parser.nextToken();', 'ensureExpectedToken(XContentParser.Token.VALUE_STRING, parser.currentToken(), parser);', 'var content = parser.text();', 'consumeUntilObjectEnd(parser); // end delta', 'consumeUntilObjectEnd(parser); // end choices', 'return content;', '}', '', 'currentToken = parser.nextToken();', '', 'return ""; // stopped'], removed_lines=['private static final String FINISH_REASON_FIELD = "finish_reason";', 'private static final String STOP_MESSAGE = "stop";', 'if (currentToken == XContentParser.Token.END_OBJECT) {', 'consumeUntilObjectEnd(parser); // end choices', 'return ""; // stopped', '}', 'if (currentToken == XContentParser.Token.FIELD_NAME && parser.currentName().equals(CONTENT_FIELD)) {', 'parser.nextToken();', '} else {', 'positionParserAtTokenAfterField(parser, CONTENT_FIELD, FAILED_TO_FIND_FIELD_TEMPLATE);', 'ensureExpectedToken(XContentParser.Token.VALUE_STRING, parser.currentToken(), parser);', 'var content = parser.text();', 'consumeUntilObjectEnd(parser); // end delta', 'return content;'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)
